subcodes.title: Words to George Latimer spoken around 1920
subcodes.first_line: Very good, but all should direct attention to the teachings. They should not mention in such and such a place, such things were happening, and teachers have gone there. These affairs must be kept private
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @exhortations and counsels, @wisdom [hikmat]
